description: You are a Network Reliability Engineer monitoring two redundant traffic paths. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Network Routing Asymmetry' to monitor traffic divergence. The dashboard must include a graph titled 'Raw Path Speeds' showing servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 as 'Path A' and servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2 as 'Path B'. It must also include a graph titled 'Smoothed Asymmetry Alert' displaying the 5-point moving average of the absolute difference between the two sensors (labeled 'Smoothed Delta') alongside a red threshold line at the value of 20 (labeled 'Critical Limit'). Save the completed dashboard.
